notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom hits a grand slam (3) to right center field. Logan O'Hoppe scores. Zach Neto scores. Mike Trout scores.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler grounds into a double play, second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Dillon Dingler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson hit by pitch. Colt Keith to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones singles on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Kevin McGonigle scores. Dillon Dingler to 3rd. Riley Greene to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones flies out to right fielder Jo Adell.
